agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The map of St Albans City Core was successfully matched using the intersection of Bricket Road and Upper Marlborough Road. The match produced a very strong result with 841 inliers, good scale consistency (0.82), and high road name agreement (13/18 roads matched). The Article 4 boundary shown in red on the map was correctly projected to GeoJSON.

iterations.reasoning: Candidate 0 shows a strong match with 841 inliers and clear visual alignment between the planning map and OS tile. The red polygon on the OS map correctly outlines the city core area bounded by Victoria Street (B691) to the south and Upper Marlborough Road to the east, matching the green mask on the source document.
